message:
feat(store,runtime): convert NUM_DATABASES to runtime-configurable Vec

- db_key_counts and db_expires_counts changed from [usize; 16] fixed
  arrays to Vec<usize>, enabling runtime database count configuration
- Add database_count field to Store (default 16, matching Redis)
- NUM_DATABASES const renamed to DEFAULT_NUM_DATABASES
- All db index validation uses store.database_count instead of const
- parse_db_index_arg takes database_count parameter
- flushall uses Vec::fill(0) instead of array reassignment

Closes: frankenredis-ghz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
